debug_info.goal:
S : Type u_1
n : ℕ
i : Fin n
f : Fin n → RelIO S
⊢ PortMap.getIO (@Graphiti.Projects.Noc.RelIO.liftFinf (RelIO S) n f) { inst := InstIdent.top, name := ↑i } = f i

failed_attempts:
unfold RelIO.liftFinf
        induction n with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n IH =>
          simp [fin_range]
          refine Fin.cases ?_ ?_ i
          · simp
          · intro j
            simp
            have h_shift : ∀ (xs : List (Nat × RelIO S)),
              (xs.map (λ p => (p.1 + 1, p.2))).toAssocList.getIO (j.val + 1) = xs.toAssocList.getIO j.val := by
              intro xs
              induction xs <;> simp_all
            rw [h_shift]
            exact IH

  end RelIO

induction n with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n ih =>
          simp only [RelIO.liftFinf, fin_range, List.map_cons]
          match i with
          | ⟨0, _⟩ => simp
          | ⟨k+1, hk⟩ =>
            simp
            let g := f ∘ lift_fin
            let k' : Fin n := ⟨k, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hk⟩
            rw [←ih (i := k') (f := g)]
            generalize hl : fin_range n = l
            induction l with
            | nil => rfl
            | cons hd tl l_ih =>
              simp only [List.map_cons]
              by_cases h : hd.val = k
              · simp [h]
              · simp [h]; exact l_ih

induction n with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n IH =>
          dsimp [RelIO.liftFinf, fin_range]
          match i with
          | ⟨0, _⟩ => simp
          | ⟨k + 1, h⟩ =>
            simp
            exact IH (i := ⟨k, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h⟩) (f := f ∘ lift_fin)

  end RelIO

induction n with

              | cons hd tl ih => simp [ih]
            rw [h_shift]
            exact IH (i := ⟨j, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hj⟩) (f := f ∘ lift_fin)

induction n generalizing i f with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n IH =>

            simp [lift_fin]

                        PortMap.getIO (l.map (fun x : Fin n => (↑x.val, f (lift_fin x))) |>.toAssocList) ↑j := by

              split <;> simp_all

induction n with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n IH =>
          simp [RelIO.liftFinf, fin_range]
          refine Fin.cases ?_ ?_ i
          · simp
          · intro j
            simp
            let g := f ∘ lift_fin
            have : (fin_range n |>.map (λ i => (i.1 + 1, f (lift_fin i))) |>.toAssocList).getIO (Fin.succ j) =
                   (RelIO.liftFinf n g).getIO j := by
              dsimp [RelIO.liftFinf]
              generalize fin_range n = l
              induction l with
              | nil => simp
              | cons hd tl step =>
                simp
                by_cases h : hd.1 = j.1
                · simp [h]
                · simp [h]
                  have h' : ¬(hd.1 + 1 = j.1 + 1) := by simp [h]
                  simp [h', step]
            rw [this, IH]
            rfl
  
  end RelIO

induction n generalizing i with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n ih =>
          unfold RelIO.liftFinf fin_range

          cases i using Fin.cases
          · simp [PortMap.getIO, AssocList.find?]
          · rename_i i

            convert ih (f := f ∘ lift_fin)
            generalize fin_range n = l
            induction l <;> simp [*, AssocList.find?]
            split <;> simp_all

induction n with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n IH =>

          simp only [List.map_cons]
          match i with

            have : f ⟨k+1, hk⟩ = (f ∘ lift_fin) k' := rfl
            rw [this, ←IH (f := f ∘ lift_fin)]
            dsimp [RelIO.liftFinf]
            generalize fin_range n = l
            induction l <;> simp [*]

induction n with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n ih =>

          match i with

            simp
            rw [← ih (i := ⟨k, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hk⟩) (f := f ∘ lift_fin)]
            simp [RelIO.liftFinf]
            generalize fin_range n = l

            | cons hd tl ih_l =>

              · simp [h]

induction n with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n IH =>
          rw [RelIO.liftFinf]
          simp only [fin_range, List.map_cons, List.toAssocList_cons]
          refine Fin.cases ?_ ?_ i
          · intro; simp [RelIO.liftFinf]
          · intro j
            simp only [Fin.val_succ, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]
            let g := f ∘ lift_fin
            change (fin_range n).map (λ x => (↑x.1 + 1, g x)) |>.toAssocList |>.getIO _ = g j
            rw [← IH (f := g)]
            dsimp [RelIO.liftFinf]
            generalize fin_range n = l
            induction l with
            | nil => rfl
            | cons hd tl step =>
              simp only [List.map_cons, List.toAssocList_cons]
              simp [step]

  end RelIO

induction n with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n IH =>
          rw [liftFinf, fin_range]
          simp only [List.map_cons, List.map_map, Function.comp_apply, List.toAssocList_cons]
          cases i using Fin.cases with
          | zero => simp
          | succ i =>
            simp
            let f' := f ∘ lift_fin
            have H := IH (i := i) (f := f')
            rw [liftFinf] at H
            generalize (fin_range n) = l
            induction l with
            | nil => simp [H]
            | cons h t ih =>
              simp only [List.map_cons, List.toAssocList_cons] at *
              simp [ih]

  end RelIO

induction n with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n IH =>
          simp only [RelIO.liftFinf, fin_range, List.map_cons, List.toAssocList_cons]
          revert i
          apply Fin.cases
          · simp
          · intro i
            simp
            rw [← IH]
            generalize fin_range n = l
            induction l <;> simp_all [RelIO.liftFinf]

induction n with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n ih =>
          dsimp [RelIO.liftFinf, fin_range, lift_fin]
          cases i using Fin.cases with
          | zero => simp
          | succ j =>
            simp
            rw [← ih (f ∘ lift_fin) j]
            dsimp [RelIO.liftFinf]
            generalize fin_range n = l
            induction l <;> simp [*]

induction n with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n IH =>
          dsimp [liftFinf, fin_range]
          match i with
          | ⟨0, _⟩ => simp
          | ⟨i + 1, hi⟩ =>
            simp
            set f' := f ∘ lift_fin
            have : f ⟨i + 1, hi⟩ = f' ⟨i, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi⟩ := rfl
            rw [this, ← IH (f := f')]
            generalize fin_range n = l
            induction l <;> simp [lift_fin, *]

  end RelIO

revert i f
        induction n with
        | zero => intro i; exact i.elim0
        | succ n ih =>
          intro i f
          dsimp [RelIO.liftFinf, fin_range]
          rw [List.map_cons, List.toAssocList_cons]
          match i with
          | ⟨0, _⟩ => simp
          | ⟨k + 1, hk⟩ =>
            simp
            let i' : Fin n := ⟨k, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hk⟩
            have eq : ⟨k + 1, hk⟩ = lift_fin i' := rfl
            rw [eq]
            have h_shift (l : List (Fin n)) :
              (l.map (λ x => (↑(lift_fin x).toNat, f (lift_fin x)))).toAssocList.getIO (lift_fin i') =
              (l.map (λ x => (↑x.toNat, f (lift_fin x)))).toAssocList.getIO i' := by
              induction l with
              | nil => simp
              | cons hd tl h_ind =>
                simp
                by_cases h : hd = i'
                · subst h; simp
                · have h' : lift_fin hd ≠ lift_fin i' := mt (λ h => by cases hd; cases i'; injection h; simp_all) h
                  simp [h, h', h_ind]
            rw [h_shift]
            exact ih

induction n with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n IH =>
          dsimp [liftFinf, fin_range]
          match i with
          | ⟨0, _⟩ => simp
          | ⟨k+1, hk⟩ =>
            simp
            let f' := λ x => f (lift_fin x)
            rw [← IH ⟨k, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hk⟩ f']
            generalize fin_range n = l
            induction l <;> dsimp
            · rfl
            · next hd tl step =>
              by_cases h : hd.1 = k
              · simp [h]
              · simp [mt Nat.succ_inj.mp h, step]

revert f i
        induction n with
        | zero => intro _ i; exact i.elim0
        | succ n HR =>
          intro f i
          simp [RelIO.liftFinf, fin_range]
          match i with
          | ⟨0, _⟩ => simp
          | ⟨k+1, hk⟩ => simp [lift_fin, HR]

induction n with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n ih =>
          rw [RelIO.liftFinf, fin_range]
          simp only [List.map_cons, List.map_map, Function.comp_apply, List.toAssocList_cons]
          match i with
          | ⟨0, _⟩ => simp
          | ⟨k+1, hk⟩ =>
            simp
            exact ih (i := ⟨k, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hk⟩) (f := f ∘ lift_fin)

  end RelIO

induction n generalizing i with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n IH =>
          unfold RelIO.liftFinf fin_range
          simp only [List.map_cons, List.map_map, Function.comp_apply]
          rcases i with ⟨val, h⟩
          cases val with
          | zero =>
            simp [PortMap.getIO, AssocList.find?, List.find?, InstIdent.top]
            rfl
          | succ val =>
            simp [PortMap.getIO, AssocList.find?, List.find?, InstIdent.top]
            let f' : Fin n → RelIO S := fun k => f (lift_fin k)
            have h_lt : val < n := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h
            specialize IH (i := ⟨val, h_lt⟩) (f := f')
            unfold RelIO.liftFinf fin_range at IH
            simp only [List.map_map, Function.comp_apply] at IH
            rw [← IH]
            generalize (fin_range n).map (λ x => (x.toNat, f' x)) = l
            induction l with
            | nil => simp [PortMap.getIO, AssocList.find?, List.find?, InstIdent.top]
            | cons hd tl hl =>
              simp [PortMap.getIO, AssocList.find?, List.find?, InstIdent.top]
              split
              · next h_eq => simp [Nat.succ_inj.mp h_eq]
              · next h_ne =>
                simp only [Nat.succ_inj] at h_ne
                simp [h_ne, hl]

induction n generalizing i with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n ih =>
          dsimp [RelIO.liftFinf, fin_range]
          simp only [List.map_cons, List.map_map, Function.comp_apply]
          match i with
          | ⟨0, _⟩ => simp
          | ⟨i+1, h⟩ =>
            simp
            have : (↑(i+1) : Nat) ≠ 0 := Nat.succ_ne_zero i
            simp [this]
            exact ih ⟨i, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h⟩ (f ∘ lift_fin)

revert i f
        induction n with
        | zero => intro i; exact i.elim0
        | succ n IH =>
          intro i f
          rw [RelIO.liftFinf, fin_range]
          simp only [List.map_cons, List.toAssocList_cons]
          cases i using Fin.cases with
          | zero => simp
          | succ j =>
            simp only [Fin.val_succ, Fin.cast_succ_succ]
            have h_shift : ∀ (l : List (Nat × RelIO S)) (k : Nat),
              PortMap.getIO (l.map (λ p => (p.1 + 1, p.2))).toAssocList {inst := InstIdent.top, name := k + 1} =
              PortMap.getIO l.toAssocList {inst := InstIdent.top, name := k} := by
                intro l k; induction l <;> simp_all
            have : ((fin_range n).map lift_fin).map (λ i => (i.val, f i)) =
                   ((fin_range n).map (λ i => (i.val, f i.succ))).map (λ p => (p.1 + 1, p.2)) := by
              simp only [List.map_map, lift_fin, Fin.val_succ]; rfl
            rw [this, h_shift, IH]

  end RelIO

induction n generalizing i with
        | zero => exact i.elim0
        | succ n ih =>
          dsimp [liftFinf, fin_range]; rw [List.map_map]
          match i with
          | ⟨0, _⟩ => simp [PortMap.getIO, AssocList.find?, List.find?, BEq.beq]
          | ⟨k+1, hk⟩ =>
            simp [PortMap.getIO, AssocList.find?, List.find?, BEq.beq]
            have : ∀ l, (l.map (fun x : Fin n => (x.1 + 1, f (lift_fin x))) |>.toAssocList).getIO (k + 1) =
                        (l.map (fun x : Fin n => (x.1, f (lift_fin x))) |>.toAssocList).getIO k := by
              intro l; induction l <;> simp [PortMap.getIO, AssocList.find?, List.find?, BEq.beq, *]
              split <;> simp_all [Nat.add_right_cancel_iff]
            rw [this]
            exact ih (⟨k, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hk⟩) (f ∘ lift_fin)
